notes:
• Detect Events & People (⌥⌘D, also offered after OCR): on-device proposals — every date becomes a chronology candidate, every name a people candidate; tick and add, each linked to its source document. Nothing leaves your Mac.
• Translate with DeepL (right-click an exhibit): translations with your own DeepL key, attached as clearly marked machine-translation files.
• DeepL has no Turkmen; name detection is Latin-script only (dates work everywhere).
